a.style: font-family:'Playfair Display', Georgia, 'Times New Roman', 'Liberation Serif', serif

text.tspan: Share of male vs. female employment in industry, 2022
The horizontal axis shows female employment in industry as a share of total female employment. The vertical
axis shows male employment in industry as a share of total male employment. The industry sector consists of
mining, manufacturing, construction, and public utilities.
Employment in industry, female (% of female employment)
Employment in industry, male (% of male employment)
Data source: Multiple sources compiled by World Bank (2024)
